name: Spinner
description: Animated loading indicator for representing an in-progress async operation. Renders a `<span>` element.

props.name: colorPalette
props.description: Controls the stroke color of the spinning arc. Use `inverse` when placing the spinner on a colored or filled background; the stroke color will inherit from the parent element's `color` property.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the overall dimensions of the spinner.

props.name: render
props.description:
Allows you to replace the component's HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
